data.content: Implementation review rejected. 1. Acceptance criteria 1 and 3 are not validated by the current browser check: scripts/test-copilot-settings-ui.mjs still performs a single add at lines 53-55 and waits for a 'registered' marker, but src/components/settings-agents-scanned.tsx lines 336-349 now render selected-model pills instead of that legacy state, and src/components/__tests__/settings-agents-scanned.test.ts lines 138-140 explicitly assert that 'registered' is absent. 2. Acceptance criterion 1 cannot be exercised end-to-end because scripts/test-fixtures/fake-copilot.sh lines 17-33 do not implement 'copilot help config', so the scan fixture does not expose multiple models from one scan session. 3. Acceptance criterion 4 also lacks direct coverage: the added unit tests in src/components/__tests__/settings-agents-scanned.test.ts are static-markup checks and do not exercise canceling with zero selections or persisting multiple selections from a single scan.
